## BUG-1 [P1] — Homepage insights section redesigned: single card, partial content leak

**Severity:** P1 (content quality — regression from previous fix)

**Previous state (2026-06-23 13:40):** 3 insight cards with unique text. Card 2 still empty.

**Current state (2026-06-23 14:20):** The insights section has been restructured into a single featured card:
- **Card 1** (`bBMJFZ1JRng`): Shows full insight text about US Commerce Secretary / ASML ✅
- **Card 2** (`4y9DR2WwW3o`): Shows only "🟢▶Watch on YouTube" — **no insight text** ❌
- **Card 3** (`_FBivfgOvuE`): Shows as "Getting your first 10 customers..." — **unique text** ✅

**Additionally:** The insight text for Card 1 is displayed as the main card body content, making it look like all 3 videos share the same summary. The layout shows 2 inline YouTube links below the main card text, which is confusing.

**Reproduction:**
1. Visit `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/`
2. Scroll to the "Insights" section (below "Projects" section)
3. Observe: single large card with ASML text, followed by "🟢▶Watch on YouTube" link for Card 2 (no insight text) and "Getting your first 10 customers" link for Card 3

**Suggested fix:**
- The empty insight issue for `4y9DR2WwW3o` persists in the new layout — `key_insight` field is still NULL in db
- Apply the WHERE guard from REQUEST.md: exclude NULL/empty key_insight from queries

## BUG-2 [P2] — Missing favicon (404 on /favicon.ico) — STILL UNFIXED

**Severity:** P2 (minor UX)

**Description:** `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/favicon.ico` returns HTTP 404. Browser tab shows generic document icon.

**Reproduction:**
1. Open any Product Tracer page
2. Check browser tab icon — generic document icon
3. Devtools → Network → filter `favicon` → observe 404

## BUG-3 [P2] — Related projects section not rendering on any tested detail page [REGRESSION]

**Severity:** P2 (UX regression — feature was partially working)

**Previous state:** `/projects/speakup` rendered the "You might also like" section with 4 project mini-cards.

**Current state:** Neither `/projects/speakup` nor `/projects/cloudflare-ai` shows a related projects section. The "You might also like" / "猜你喜欢" heading and content are entirely absent.

**Reproduction:**
1. Visit any `/projects/[slug]` page
2. Scroll to the bottom
3. No related projects section visible

**Likely cause:** The component or query may have been broken by a recent refactor. Check `getRelatedProjects()` in `apps/web/lib/db.ts` and the detail page component.

---

## BUG-4 [P2] — /projects search input is decorative/does not work

**Severity:** P2 (functional — search input gives false impression of functionality)

**URL:** `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/projects`

**Reproduction:**
1. Visit `/projects`
2. Type "speak" in search input — no dropdown, no filtering, no URL change
3. Press Enter — no action
4. Visit `/projects?q=speak` — query param ignored, all 100+ projects shown
5. `/api/search?q=speak` returns correct results ✅ → API works, frontend not wired

**Root cause:** Search input is `<input type="search">` with `id=""` and `name=""`, **not wrapped in a `<form>`** element. No onChange/onSubmit handlers. Next.js page doesn't read `searchParams.q`.

---

## BUG-5 [P2] — Breadcrumb inconsistency (FIXED — both pages now consistent)

**Status:** ✅ RESOLVED. Both `/projects/speakup` and `/projects/cloudflare-ai` now show a breadcrumb nav element that reads "Projects[slug]". The breadcrumb is **present but has no visual separator** (no `>`, `/`, or `→` between breadcrumb segments). This is minor — the breadcrumb aria-label might be missing or the styling is minimal.

**Updated observation:** The nav link text is "ProjectsSpeakUp" — renders as a single text string without separators. Consider adding `>` or `→` between segments.

**Severity:** P3 (cosmetic — affects tab identification and bookmarks)

**URL:** `/projects/cloudflare-ai`

**Observation:** Page `<title>` uses the slug segment "ai" instead of the display name "Cloudflare AI". Still unfixed.

## BUG-7 [P1] — /zh/* routes return 404 for all non-root pages

**Severity:** P1 (i18n broken — Chinese locale routes missing for all content pages)

**URLs tested:**
- `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/zh/youtube-insights` → **HTTP 404**
- `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/zh/trends` → **HTTP 404**
- `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/zh/projects` → **HTTP 404** (previously reported, still broken)
- `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/zh/` (homepage) → works ✅

**Reproduction:**
1. Click "中文" locale toggle
2. Navigate to any page other than homepage
3. All i18n subpages return 404

**Impact:** Chinese users cannot browse projects, trends, or insights. The EN/中文 toggle is misleading — switching language from homepage changes the locale but all other routes are broken.

**Root cause:** The `app/[locale]/` directory likely only has a `page.tsx` for the root route. Need dynamic route files for projects, trends, etc., or a catch-all route pattern.

---

## BUG-8 [P2] — Mobile tap targets below WCAG minimum 44px [WORSENED]

**Severity:** P2 (accessibility — affects mobile usability)

**Pages tested:** `/youtube-insights` at 375×812 viewport

**Findings (worsened from last run):**
- **32 of 32 interactive elements** are below 44px minimum height (was 9/14 on /trends)
- Nav links (Projects, Insights, Trends, Bookmarks) are **20px tall** — half the WCAG minimum
- "Product Tracer" logo link: 67×40px (width OK, height 4px short)
- EN/中文 toggle buttons: 32×24px and 31×40px — both below minimum
- Category filter `<select>`: 327×33px — 11px short on height
- Grid/List toggle links: 55×24px and 59×24px — 20px short on height
- **"▶Watch on YouTube" links: only 16px tall** — 28px below WCAG minimum, extremely hard to tap

**Reproduction:**
1. Open Chrome DevTools
2. Set viewport to 375×812 (iPhone)
3. Visit `/youtube-insights`
4. Inspect any interactive element — all fail WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 2.5.5

**Recommended fix:** Increase all nav and content link hit areas to at least 44px using padding (`py-3` instead of `py-1`).

---

## BUG-9 [P2] — Homepage Insights section: i18n key leak "home.section.insights.viewAll"

**Severity:** P2 (content quality — leaking internal locale key)

**URL:** `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/`

**Observation:** The "View all" link text in the Insights section heading reads:
`InsightsFresh takeaways from across YouTubehome.section.insights.viewAll`

The i18n key `home.section.insights.viewAll` is rendered **literally** as the link text instead of being resolved to a human-readable string like "View all" or "查看全部".

**Reproduction:**
1. Visit homepage
2. Scroll to Insights section
3. Look at the "View all" link — shows the i18n key instead of its translated value

---

## BUG-10 [P1] — /en/* routes also return 404

**Severity:** P1 (i18n — EN locale prefix route not implemented)

**URLs tested:**
- `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/en/youtube-insights` → **HTTP 404** (no redirect to `/youtube-insights`)
- Likely all `/en/*` routes are 404

**Note:** This differs from BUG-7. The EN route prefix (e.g., `/en/youtube-insights`) is completely unimplemented. If a user manually navigates to `/en/youtube-insights` they get a 404, unlike the default locale route which works. The locale toggle on the homepage is a client-side state toggle, not a URL-based link — clicking "EN" on the homepage doesn't navigate to `/en/`.

**Root cause:** The middleware/route handler only sets up `[locale]` as a catch-all for `zh`, but doesn't handle `en` as a prefix. Or the app only supports `zh` prefix with `en` as default (no prefix). No middleware redirect exists for `/en/*` → `/*`.

---

## BUG-11 [P2] — /youtube-insights has 0 images — YouTube thumbnails missing

**Severity:** P2 (content — video cards have no thumbnail images)

**URL:** `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/youtube-insights`

**Observation:** The page shows 20 insight video cards, but all are rendered as plain text links with no thumbnail images. The page has `<img>` elements — **zero images total** on the page. Each card shows:
- Title text
- Category badge
- "▶Watch on YouTube" link

**Reproduction:**
1. Visit `/youtube-insights`
2. Observe all 20 video cards — no thumbnails, just text
3. Open DevTools → Elements → search for `<img>` — none found

**Impact:** Without thumbnails, the page looks like a plain list of text links. Users cannot visually identify videos. This severely reduces engagement potential.

**Suggested fix:** Add YouTube video thumbnail images using the video ID: `https://img.youtube.com/vi/{videoId}/mqdefault.jpg`. The video IDs are already available (they're in the Watch URLs).

---

## BUG-12 [P2] — Insight cards link directly to YouTube, no detail pages

**Severity:** P2 (UX — missed content depth opportunity)

**URL:** `https://product-tracer.vercel.app/youtube-insights`

**Observation:** All 20 insight cards link directly to `https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=...` (external). There are **zero detail pages** (no `/youtube-insights/[id]` links). This means:
- AI summaries (key_insight) are only shown on the homepage, not on the /youtube-insights page
- Users leave the site immediately on click
- No bookmarking, commenting, or sharing per-insight
- No breadcrumb navigation on /youtube-insights (while /projects has it)

**Sample insight card anatomy (observed):** Just a title + category + external YouTube link. No excerpt, no publish date, no channel name.

**This may be intentional design** (aggregator pattern), but it's worth noting as a friction point for retention.

---

## Appendix A: Verified working (this run)

- ✅ All critical pages HTTP 200: `/`, `/projects`, `/trends`, `/youtube-insights`, `/bookmarks`, `/api/search?q=ai`
- ✅ Nav has 5 links (Projects, Insights, Trends, Bookmarks + Logo)
- ✅ Homepage loads in < 2s
- ✅ Mobile overflow: NO horizontal scroll on homepage or /youtube-insights at 375px
- ✅ /youtube-insights loads 20 video cards (all text-based)
- ✅ Grid/List toggle works (links to `/youtube-insights?view=grid`)
- ✅ Category filter works: `<select>` with 8 categories + counts
- ✅ List view toggle changes layout (confirmed via body HTML length change)
- ✅ Homepage has content sections: Projects (GitHub, HN, Product Hunt, YouTube), Insights, Trends
- ✅ /bookmarks loads with empty state
- ✅ 0 i18n key leaks on /youtube-insights page
- ✅ 0 console errors (except expected 404 from ZH route probe)
